changes.old: {'id': 'BIG_MUSHROOM', 'title': 'Big Mushroom', 'description': 'Obtain [gold]Big Mushroom[/gold]. Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]20[/blue]. At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] fewer cards.'}, {'id': 'FRAGRANT_MUSHROOM', 'title': 'Fragrant Mushroom', 'description': 'Obtain [gold]Fragrant Mushroom[/gold]. Upon pickup, lose [blue]15[/blue] HP and [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] random cards.'}
changes.new: {'id': 'BIG_MUSHROOM', 'title': 'Big Mushroom', 'description': 'Obtain [gold]Big Mushroom[/gold]. Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]20[/blue]. At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] fewer cards.'}, {'id': 'FRAGRANT_MUSHROOM', 'title': 'Fragrant Mushroom', 'description': 'Obtain [gold]Fragrant Mushroom[/gold]. Upon pickup, lose [blue]15[/blue] HP and [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] random cards.'}

changes.old:
{'id': 'BIG_MUSHROOM', 'description': 'You bite into the [orange]Big Mushroom[/orange]. Its flesh is firm, starchy, and satisfying. The more you eat, the hungrier you become, as if the mushroom is feeding on your hunger.

[sine]So yummy... you enter a [red]food coma[/red].[/sine]
This gluttony will cost you.'}, {'id': 'FRAGRANT_MUSHROOM', 'description': 'You sample the [green]Fragrant One[/green], a small woody mushroom with a delicate scent of shellfish...

A burst of energy spurs you to run, jump, and [gold]rigorously train[/gold]!
Then, a sudden [red][jitter]stabbing pain[/jitter][/red] hits you as the living fungi struggles within you during its brief final moments.'}, {'id': 'INITIAL', 'description': "[sine]How long has it been since you ate?
...wait, what's that fantastic smell?[/sine]

Following the scent, you reach a cozy campground with all manner of [green]tasty mushrooms[/green] being cooked! You don't consider the safety of eating these mushrooms because you are so hungry.
(So hungry that you don't notice the dead adventurer)", 'options': [{'id': 'BIG_MUSHROOM', 'title': 'Big Mushroom', 'description': 'Obtain [gold]Big Mushroom[/gold]. Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]20[/blue]. At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] fewer cards.'}, {'id': 'FRAGRANT_MUSHROOM', 'title': 'Fragrant Mushroom', 'description': 'Obtain [gold]Fragrant Mushroom[/gold]. Upon pickup, lose [blue]15[/blue] HP and [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] random cards.'}]}, {'id': 'MEDLEY', 'description': 'The [green]medley of mushrooms[/green] looks the most appetizing so you go for that.

[red][jitter]“MY MUSHROOMS!!”[/jitter][/red]

The adventurer, presumably dead, attacks you! You knock them out, and with a seasoning of guilt, finish the rest of the fine meal.'}

{'id': 'OBSERVE', 'title': 'Observe', 'description': '[gold]Enchant[/gold] a Basic [gold]Strike[/gold] or [gold]Defend[/gold] with [purple]Spiral[/purple].'}, {'id': 'DRINK', 'title': 'Drink', 'description': 'Heal [green]33% Max[/green] HP.'}

changes.old:
{'id': 'DRINK', 'description': 'You cup your hands and dip it into the [sine][aqua]Spiraling Whirlpool[/aqua][/sine].

Its waters fill your hands at a gentle rate as you take small sips with your eyes closed.

Delicious water [sine]spirals[/sine] through you to your [gold]Center[/gold], washing away harmful thoughts and physical ailments...'}, {'id': 'INITIAL', 'description': 'You happen upon a [aqua][sine]Massive Spiraling Whirlpool[/sine][/aqua]. The water swirls with beautiful precision and its surrounding walls are adorned with spiral patterns.

[purple][sine]Around and around... around...
....and around.... what a sight......[/sine][/purple]

What do you do?', 'options': [{'id': 'OBSERVE', 'title': 'Observe', 'description': '[gold]Enchant[/gold] a [gold]Strike[/gold] or [gold]Defend[/gold] with [purple]Spiral[/purple].'}, {'id': 'DRINK', 'title': 'Drink', 'description': 'Heal [green]33% Max[/green] HP.'}]}, {'id': 'OBSERVE', 'description': "[sine][purple]...ah-   so beautiful.....
So it spins... still spinning around. Yes...
Oh! Was that..... a little splash...?
....of course. You deserve some fun, too[/purple] [aqua]Mr. Spiral[/aqua][purple]... haha...
... .......   ...[/purple][/sine]

It's time to go now.
You whisper something as you take your leave.

[gold]“Thank you, Spiral.”[/gold]"}

{'id': 'BLOODY_INK', 'description': 'The [aqua]scribe[/aqua] carefully picks up the vial filled with a [red]bright red ink[/red] and gives it a shake, then gestures with their own hand a dipping motion.

You dip your fingers into the ink and a [green][jitter]jolt of vitality[/jitter][/green] courses through you!

Pleased with your reaction, the [aqua]scribe[/aqua] gives a polite bow and waves you goodbye.'}, {'id': 'INITIAL', 'description': 'Navigating the murky passages, you stumble upon a [aqua]withered figure[/aqua] working a small shop.
